XACT Graphical User Interface Commands

XACT (xact.exe) allows you to easily create XACT project (.xap) files. XACT projects are useful for creating and managing wave bank (.xwb) and sound bank (.xsb) files. Using xact.exe and the Audio Console Application, audio developers and sound designers can preview (or audition) waves, sounds, and cues on the Xbox® video game system. Applications compiled with the instrumented XACT library (xactengi.lib for retail, xactengd.lib or xactengid.lib for debug) support auditioning much like the Audio Console Application.

  • Main Menu Commands
  • Context Menu Commands
  • Related Topics

Main Menu Commands

The main menu that appears at the top of the XACT window has the following options.

  • File
  • Edit
  • View
  • Wave Banks
  • Sound Banks
  • Audition
  • Window
  • Help

File

The File option has the following commands:

New Project
Creates a new project file. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+N.
Open Project
Opens an existing project file. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+O.
Import Project
Merges an existing project into the current project.

Note    This command does not automatically rename, so if the projects have conflicting sound bank or wave bank names or paths, the import will fail.

Reload Project
Reloads the current project.
Save Project
Saves the current project file. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+S.
Save Project As
Saves the current project file with a different file name.
Recent Files
Displays a list of recently accessed project files.
Build
Brings up the Build Project dialog box. The shortcut key for this menu item is F7.
Exit
Closes xact.exe. The shortcut key for this menu item is ALT+F4.

Edit

The Edit option has the following commands:

Cut
Cuts the current selection. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+X.
Copy
Copies the current selection to the clipboard. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+C.
Paste
Pastes the current selection from the clipboard. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+V.
Rename
Renames the current selection. The shortcut key for this menu item is F2.
Delete
Deletes the current selection from the project. The shortcut key for this menu item is DELETE.
Select All
Selects all items in the active window. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+A.

View

The View option has the following commands:

Options
Brings up the Options dialog box, where you can adjust application start-up, user interface, and file import settings.
Audition Monitor
Toggles the audition monitor window. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+ALT+A.
Mixer Window
Toggles the mixer window. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+ALT+M.
List
Shows the audio files in list view. This view displays the audio file name only.
Details
Shows the audio files in detail view. This view displays the audio file name, format, sample rate, bit depth, channel count, file size, conversion, options, and full path to the source file.
Refresh
Refreshes the current project workspace. The shortcut key for this menu item is F5.
Properties
Brings up the properties dialog box for the currently selected audio file or wave bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is ALT+ENTER.

Wave Banks

The Wave Banks option has the following commands:

New Wave Bank
Brings up the New Wave Bank dialog box for adding a new wave bank file to the current project.
Insert Wave File
Opens the Insert Wave Into Bank dialog box. The added file can be of type WAV, AIF, AIFF, or WMA. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+W.
Wave Options
Sets options for a selected wave file. Options include conversion to ADPCM, conversion to 8-bit PCM, enabling zero-latency streaming, and removing loop tail.

Sound Banks

The Sound Banks option has the following commands:

New Sound Bank
Brings up the New Sound Bank dialog box for adding a new sound bank file to the current project.
New Sound
Brings up the New Sound dialog box for adding a sound to the current sound bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+D.
Sound Options
Sets options for a selected sound. Options include adding the sound to the mixer window, enabling headroom boost, enabling parametric EQ, and enabling 3D positioning.
New Track
Creates a new track in the current sound bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+K.
New Track Event
Adds a new track event to the current track.
New Cue
Brings up the New Cue dialog box. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+U.
Cue Options
Sets options for a selected cue. Options include enabling queueing and enabling crossfade.
New Group
Adds a new group to the group list. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+G.
New Category
Adds a new category to the category list. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+T.
New Layer
Adds a new layer to the layer list. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+L.

Audition

The Audition option has the following commands:

Connect to Default Xbox
Connects to most recent Xbox accessed through the XACT user interface. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+R.
Connect to Xbox
Connects xact.exe to the Audio Console Application.
Disconnect from Xbox
Disconnects xact.exe from the Audio Console Application.
Recent Connections
Lists the most recent Xbox connections.
Play
Plays a selected audio file on the Xbox. The shortcut key for this menu item is SPACE.
Stop
Stops a playing audio file on the Xbox. The shortcut key for this menu item is ESCAPE.
Stop All
Stops all playing audio files on the Xbox. The shortcut key for this menu item is SHIFT+ESCAPE.

Window

The Window option has the following commands:

Next
Sets focus to the next Wave Bank window.
Previous
Sets focus to the previous Wave Bank window.
Cascade
Cascades the next Wave Bank windows.
Tile Horizontally
Tiles the next Wave Bank windows horizontally.
Tile Vertically
Tiles the next Wave Bank windows vertically.
Close
Closes the current Wave Bank window.
Close All
Closes all Wave Bank windows.

Help

The Help option has the following commands:

About
Displays the xact.exe version and copyright information. The shortcut key for this menu item is F1.

Context Menu Commands

When you right click in the Wave Bank section of the project workspace, the context menu for xact.exe shows the following options:

Open
Opens the selected wave bank.
Refresh
Refreshes the current project workspace.
Rename
Renames the selected wave bank.
Delete
Deletes the selected wave bank.
Properties
Displays the properties dialog box for the selected wave bank.

When you right click in the audio file section of the project workspace, the context menu for xact.exe shows the following options:

Play
Plays the selected audio file on the Xbox. The shortcut key for this menu item is ENTER.
Stop
Stops a playing audio file on the Xbox.
Compression
Sets a wave compression type for the selected PCM wave file. This can be set to ADPCM, 8-bit PCM, or none.
Options
Sets options for the selected wave file. (Not currently supported.)
Cut
Cuts the selected audio file. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+X.
Copy
Copies the selected audio file to the clipboard. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+C.
Paste
Pastes the audio file from the clipboard into the wave bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+V.
Delete
Deletes the selected audio file from the wave bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is DELETE.
Rename
Renames the selected audio file. The shortcut key for this menu item is F2.
Select All
Selects all the audio files in the current wave bank. The shortcut key for this menu item is CTRL+A.
Properties
Brings up the properties dialog box for the currently selected audio file. The shortcut key for this menu item is ALT+ENTER.
